zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Ier 'le Magnifique' duc de Normandie於1000年6月22日出生在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯法拉時，他的父親Richard II 'le Bon' duc de Normandie36歲，母親Judith de Bretagne duchesse consort de Normandie18歲。他和Herleva de Falaise至少有1個兒子。他去世於1035年7月2日在土耳其享年35歲，埋葬在土耳其。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian vernacular form of   Peter .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: 'le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Ier 'le Magnifique' duc de Normandie was born on 22 June 1000, in Falaise, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France, his father, Richard II 'le Bon' duc de Normandie, was 36 and his mother, Judith de Bretagne duchesse consort de Normandie, was 18. He had at least 1 son with Herleva de Falaise. He died on 2 July 1035, in Türkiye, at the age of 35, and was buried in Türkiye.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Ier 'le Magnifique' duc de Normandie est né le 22 juin 1000, à Falaise, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, Richard II 'le Bon' duc de Normandie, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Judith de Bretagne duchesse consort de Normandie, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Herleva de Falaise. Il est décédé le 2 juillet 1035, à Turquie, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterré à Turquie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Ier 'le Magnifique' duc de Normandie am 22. Juni 1000 in Falaise, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard II 'le Bon' duc de Normandie 36 und seine Mutter Judith de Bretagne duchesse consort de Normandie 18. Er hatte mit Herleva de Falaise mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 2. Juli 1035 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Türkei und wurde in Türkei begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Ier 'le Magnifique' duc de Normandie è nato il il 22 giugno 1000 nel Falaise, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Richard II 'le Bon' duc de Normandie, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Judith de Bretagne duchesse consort de Normandie, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Herleva de Falaise. Morì il 2 luglio 1035, nel Turchia, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolto a Turchia.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Ier 'le Magnifique' duc de Normandieが1000年6月22日にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスファレイゼで生まれた時，父Richard II 'le Bon' duc de Normandieは36歳，母Judith de Bretagne duchesse consort de Normandieは18歳であった。彼はHerleva de Falaiseとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1035年7月2日にトルコで35歳で死去し，トルコにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Ier 'le Magnifique' duc de Normandie(이)가 1000년 6월 22일 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 팔레이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard II 'le Bon' duc de Normandie(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Judith de Bretagne duchesse consort de Normandie(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Herleva de Falaise(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1035년 7월 2일 튀르키예에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 튀르키예에 묻혔다.

mn.22 June 1000–2 July 1035: 1000 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 22–1035 оны Долоодугаар сарын 2

pt.22 June 1000–2 July 1035: 22 de junho de 1000–2 de julho de 1035
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Ier 'le Magnifique' duc de Normandie nasceu em 22 de junho de 1000, em Falaise, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França, seu pai, Richard II 'le Bon' duc de Normandie, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Judith de Bretagne duchesse consort de Normandie, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Herleva de Falaise. Ele faleceu em 2 de julho de 1035, em Turquia, com 35 anos, e foi sepultado em Turquia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Ier 'le Magnifique' duc de Normandie родился 22 июня 1000 г. в местности фалеис, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Richard II 'le Bon' duc de Normandie было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Judith de Bretagne duchesse consort de Normandie, 18. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Herleva de Falaise. Он умер 2 июля 1035 г. в местности Турция в возрасте 35 лет и был похоронен в местности Турция.

es.22 June 1000–2 July 1035: 22 de junio de 1000–2 de julio de 1035
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Ier 'le Magnifique' duc de Normandie nació el 22 de junio de 1000, en Falaise, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Richard II 'le Bon' duc de Normandie, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Judith de Bretagne duchesse consort de Normandie, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Herleva de Falaise. Murió el 2 de julio de 1035, en Turquía, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultado en Turquía.
